emailBanner.title: Verify your email to protect your account
emailBanner.body: We sent a link to {{email}}. Click it to confirm your registration. Without verification you won't be able to log back in after logging out.
emailBanner.storeUnknown: Store not identified. Please retry after logging in.
emailBanner.resentToast: Verification email resent. Check your inbox.
emailBanner.resendError: Unable to resend the email. Please try again later.

orders.title: My orders
orders.description: Purchase history and status of each order.
orders.errorBody: Try again in a moment. If the problem persists, contact the merchant's support.
orders.emptyDescription: When you complete a purchase you'll find it here with status and details.

courses.title: My courses
courses.descriptionWithCount_one: {{count}} active course. Click to resume where you left off.
courses.descriptionWithCount_other: {{count}} active courses. Click to resume where you left off.
courses.descriptionEmpty: When you purchase a course you'll find it here.
courses.emptyDescription: Explore the catalog to discover available video courses. Once purchased, you'll watch it here with player + progress tracking.

profile.pageDescription: Manage your personal data and account security.

account.title: Account data
account.phoneHint: Optional, used by the merchant to contact you if needed.
account.emailHint: To change the email contact the merchant's support.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.body: Your email {{email}} is not verified yet.
verify.hint: Look in your inbox for the message sent at registration. If you can't find it, we can resend it.

orderDetail.notFoundDescription: Maybe the link is no longer valid or the order belongs to another account. Go back to your orders list to find it.

courseCta.title: Access your courses
courseCta.body: The course is ready. Open it from the "My courses" area to follow the lessons and track your progress.

orderItemEvent.pendingHint: Tickets will be available after payment confirmation.

orderItemService.pendingHint: The booking will be confirmed after payment.

orderItemRental.pendingHint: The reservation will be confirmed after payment.

orderItemDigital.pendingHint: Download will be available after payment confirmation.

orderItemCourse.pendingHint: Course access will be activated after payment confirmation.

player.pickLessonMobile: Tap 📚 above to pick a lesson, or start with the first one.
player.pickLessonDesktop: Pick a lesson from the menu on the left, or start with the first one.
player.noLessonsYet: The instructor hasn't added any lessons yet.

noVideo.title: Video not available yet
noVideo.body: The instructor is still uploading this lesson. Come back later or pick another lesson from the side menu.

bunnyMissing.title: Video service temporarily unavailable
bunnyMissing.body: We're fixing a configuration issue. Contact the merchant if the problem persists.

notFound.title: Course not found
notFound.body: The link may no longer be valid.

revoked.title: Access revoked
revoked.body: Access to this course has been revoked.

expired.title: Access expired
expired.body: The access period for this course has ended.

courseUnavailable.title: Content unavailable
courseUnavailable.body: The merchant has removed this course.

generic.title: Error
generic.body: Unable to load the course. Please try again later.

helpCheatsheet.title: Keyboard shortcuts
helpCheatsheet.footnote: Shortcuts don't work when you're typing in a field or when the video player has focus (in that case keys go to the video). Lessons are also marked automatically when the video ends.
